notes: Foodpanda page for The Rail Mall outlet lists current menu items and delivery prices. The Rail Mall store page confirms the outlet and vegetarian zi char focus at https://railmall.com.sg/our-stores/?type=dining. Prices may include delivery-platform markup; items marked 'from' use the displayed starting price.
